# Ancestral Knowledge

> [!note] 📖 Event · Cost: **1** · Lore

---

**Action:** Exhaust a **_Dwarf_** character to place 2 progress tokens on the active location. (4 progress tokens instead if it is an **_Underground_** or **_Mountain_** location.)
